title: Baby Gifts for Ann-Marie
excerpt: While shopping at Lundeen's , we picked out these items for Ann-Marie's little girl (due late July)! Love how everything looks in her nursery, and we cannot wait for her arrival. Also, for some reason the baby in the striped…
body:
While shopping at Lundeen's, we picked out these items for Ann-Marie's little girl (due late July)!

Love how everything looks in her nursery, and we cannot wait for her arrival. Also, for some reason the baby in the striped shirt on the cover of Snuggle the Baby kinda reminds me of Jack. Must be the hair ;)
